title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy:
Guardian Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy!
